violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Scoops for drink powders stored in containers with handles in product. Invert utensils so handles are up in BOH prep area.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a self closing door.

Storage areas for refuse, recyclables, and returnables. — --The outside storage surface for holding refuse, recyclables and returnables was not constructed of nonabsorbent material and/or sloped to drain. Dumpster located South of building located on gravel lot.

General premises. — --Window/door used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Drive up window kept open for ventilation. Recommend keeping window closed when not in immediate use or install screen.
